narrative:
Westfield Township has 852 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
